mapper.insert: insert into dms_registration (id, patient_id, create_time, end_attendance, status, skd_id, need_book, bind_status, dept_id, attendance_date, patient_age_str) values (#{id}, #{patientId}, #{createTime}, #{endAttendance}, #{status}, #{skdId}, #{needBook}, #{bindStatus}, #{deptId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{patientAgeStr})
mapper.select: select dr.id, dr.patient_id as patientId, dr.create_time as createTime, dr.end_attendance as endAttendance, dr.status, dr.skd_id as skdId, dr.need_book as needBook, dr.bind_status as bindStatus, dr.dept_id as deptId, dr.attendance_date as attendanceDate, dr.patient_age_str as patientAgeStr, p.name as patientName, d.name as deptName, skd.staff_id as doctorId, s.name as doctorName, skd.noon as noon from dms_registration dr left join pms_patient p on dr.patient_id = p.id left join sms_dept d on dr.dept_id = d.id left join sms_skd skd on dr.skd_id = skd.id left join sms_staff s on skd.staff_id = s.id order by dr.create_time desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update:
update dms_registration
dept_id = #{deptId},
skd_id = #{skdId},
attendance_date = #{attendanceDate},
where id = #{id}
